title: The Mystery of the Black Dahlia: What Happened to Elizabeth Short?

scenes.text: In 1947, Elizabeth Short's body was found, igniting a media frenzy.
scenes.query: news archive footage of 1940s Los Angeles

scenes.text: Short was known for wearing black and nicknamed 'The Black Dahlia'.
The case remains one of the most notorious unsolved murders.
scenes.label: Fascinating Cold Case

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.
scenes.ct: Join our exploration of unsolved cases.

description: The mystery surrounding Elizabeth Short and her tragic fate continues to captivate the public. Explore the details of this iconic unsolved case in today's deep dive.
